description: Layer 2 (on-chain) payroll-only NFTs for PNW MVP v2. Stores commitment-only artifacts (doc_hash/root/inputs_hash) for paystub/payroll summaries across cycle, quarterly, YTD, and EOY scopes. No raw payroll amounts or identities are published. NOTE: On-chain deployed version uses employer_agreement_v2; this source targets v4 for future redeployment.
